title: Adaptive Learning Platform for ELL and Students with Learning Disabilities
key_findings: ML-powered recommendations significantly improved engagement for ELL students and learners with disabilities

title: Community Engagement Platform for Local Nonprofits
key_findings: Participation increased when onboarding matched staff workflows instead of generic dashboards

title: Longitudinal Study of Digital Literacy in First-Year Students
key_findings: Peer mentor touchpoints improved retention of platform skills more than one-time training

title: Family Restaurant Online Ordering System
key_findings: First real-world project that helped family business during pandemic

title: Nonprofit Partner Data Validation Pipeline
key_findings: Validation rules and anomaly checks reduced bad rows before downstream reporting
